tagline: Parameterized dashboard tasks: Dashboard tasks in Jobs can now be parameterized, allowing job parameters to dynamically set dashboard filter values at runtime.
what_it_does: Parameterized dashboard tasks: Dashboard tasks in Jobs can now be parameterized, allowing job parameters to dynamically set dashboard filter values at runtime. Workspace level dashboard themes: Dashboard themes can now be configured at the workspace level. Top aligned text widgets: Text widgets now default to top aligned text.
why_it_matters: Refresh only schedules for individual data permissions: Authors and viewers of dashboards published with individual data permissions can now create refresh only schedules that trigger cache refreshes without sending notifications, improving dashboard load times.
plain_summary: Parameterized dashboard tasks: Dashboard tasks in Jobs can now be parameterized, allowing job parameters to dynamically set dashboard filter values at runtime. Workspace level dashboard themes: Dashboard themes can now be configured at the workspace level.

key_takeaway: Parameterized dashboard tasks: Dashboard tasks in Jobs can now be parameterized, allowing job parameters to dynamically set dashboard filter values at runtime.
